mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM clinic_setting WHERE deleted = 0 AND (setting_key LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT id, setting_key, setting_value, description, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM clinic_setting WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clinic_setting (setting_key, setting_value, description, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{settingKey}, #{settingValue}, #{description}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE clinic_setting setting_key = #{settingKey}, setting_value = #{settingValue}, description = #{description}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE clinic_setting SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, setting_key, setting_value, description, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM clinic_setting WHERE setting_key = #{settingKey} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
